abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: "Escar...Go!"
abilities.text: After killing an enemy model, this model may declare the Charge action, ignoring any special restrictions.

abilities.name: Slip and Slide
abilities.text: When this model removes a Drift token to place in base contact with a friendly Tide marker, it may choose a friendly Tide marker within 10" instead of 5".

actions.name: Knight's Folly
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action was generated by the Charge action, it deals +1 damage.

triggers.name: Shrug Off
triggers.text: Remove one token from this model.

triggers.name: Stumble
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has a Staggered token, deal +1 damage. Otherwise, it gains a Staggered token.

triggers.name: Friendly Waters
triggers.text: This model gains a Drift token.

actions.name: Bait the Waters
actions.effects: Move the target up to 3" toward an ally in LoS.

triggers.name: Sucked Down
triggers.text: Once per activation. Place the target into base contact with a friendly Tide marker within 6" of it. If the target is placed in this way, it is dealt 3 damage.

actions.name: Heroic Intervention
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy engaged with another friendly model only.
actions.effects: Move all friendly models engaged with the target 5" away from the target. Then, place this model in base contact with the target. This model may declare a (melee) targeting the target.
